heading: Great Lakes rail route
label: 55117 Great Lakes rail route
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5511746 App.:883 (5th proviso)., as added , .June 5, 1920, ch. 250, § 27Apr. 11, 1935, ch. 5849 Stat. 154
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5511746 App.:883 (5th proviso)., as added , .June 5, 1920, ch. 250, § 27Apr. 11, 1935, ch. 5849 Stat. 154

children.text: the car ferry is owned by a common carrier by water and operated as part of a rail route with the approval of the Surface Transportation Board;
the stock of the common carrier by water, or its predecessor, was owned or controlled by a common carrier by rail prior to ;June 5, 1920
the stock of the common carrier owning the car ferry is, with the approval of the Board, now owned or controlled by a common carrier by rail; and
the car ferry is built in and documented under the laws of the United States.
